reasoning: The FedRAMP AC-5 control focuses on the separation of duties to prevent conflicts of interest and reduce the risk of malevolent activity. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through RBAC by ensuring that no single user or service account has excessive privileges, such as the 'cluster-admin' role, which can bypass separation of duties. Enforcing least privilege and ensuring that roles are appropriately separated for different duties can help achieve this control. The proposed functions focus on preventing excessive privileges and enforcing separation of duties through RBAC configurations.
title: Separation of Duties
